narrative:
Precinct Wapakoneta 2B (precinct in Auglaize County) has 753 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
